pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version from 1.8 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Ensure the maven-compiler-plugin is configured to use the new Java version for source and target compatibility.
Add the maven-surefire-plugin to manage test execution, which is often required or recommended for modern JDKs to handle test discovery correctly.
Disable javadoc doclint errors which are stricter in newer JDKs and often break builds for legacy code.
Align the maven-surefire-report-plugin version with the maven-surefire-plugin version to ensure compatibility.
Upgrade the wagon-ssh extension to a version compatible with modern Maven and JDK environments.
Upgrade the maven-site-plugin to a version that supports the newer JDK and Maven features.
Introduce dependency management for common libraries to ensure consistent versions across child projects.
Bump commons-io to a version compatible with Java 21.
Bump commons-lang3 to a version compatible with Java 21.
Bump gson to a version compatible with Java 21.
Bump apache-poi to a version compatible with Java 21.
Bump log4j to a recent version for security and compatibility.
Bump freemarker to a version compatible with Java 21.
Bump junit to a version compatible with Java 21.
Bump internal BITPlan libraries to versions compatible with Java 21.
Bump internal SimpleGraph libraries to versions compatible with Java 21.
Add a profile for Jacoco code coverage, ensuring the plugin version is compatible with Java 21.
Replace the deprecated nexus-staging-maven-plugin with the central-publishing-maven-plugin for modern deployment.
Update the site-maven-plugin configuration to use dynamic GitHub owner/project properties.
Add the launch4j-maven-plugin for creating Windows executables, ensuring compatibility with the new build environment.
Add the maven-assembly-plugin for creating executable JARs with dependencies.
Add the maven-antrun-plugin for custom build steps like copying release artifacts.
Add the maven-shade-plugin for creating uber-JARs.

README.md.general_idea: Update README to reflect the latest version 0.0.39 and add project badges and documentation links.
README.md.human_impl: Added shields.io badges, updated version to 0.0.39, and added documentation links.

README.md.general_idea: Convert the version history section from a simple list to a structured Markdown table for better readability.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced bullet points with a Markdown table containing Version, date, and changes columns.
